title: How Ten Minutes of Silence Rewires a Proud Man's Head
caption:
How ten minutes of silence rewires a proud man's head.

No audience to perform for. No caption to write. Ten minutes in, and it's just you and how loud your own opinion of yourself actually is.

The urge to check your phone at minute two isn't boredom. It's your pride looking for a mirror. Sit past it and something starts to quiet down.

Micah 6:8 says walk humbly with your God. That's not a personality. It's a practice, and it starts in the ten minutes before the day gets a vote.

#faith #humility #christianmen #manofgod #stillness #micah6
